phrases.intent_en: Where do I buy parking zone tickets
phrases.text_local: Kde koupím lístek do parkovací zóny?
phrases.cultural_note: Parking in Czech historic centers is usually paid via street-side ticket machines. Have coins ready.

likely_response.local: U automatu na rohu, hned vedle lékárny.
likely_response.translation_en: At the machine on the corner, right next to the pharmacy.

responses.english: At the machine on the corner, right next to the pharmacy.
responses.french: U automatu na rohu, hned vedle lékárny.

phrases.intent_en: Where is the nearest tram ticket machine
phrases.text_local: Kde je nejbližší automat na lístky na tramvaj?
phrases.cultural_note: Ticket machines in Liberec are often located directly at tram stops. Cash and card are usually accepted.

likely_response.translation_en: At the stop opposite the town hall, on the left.

responses.english: At the stop opposite the town hall, on the left.

phrases.intent_en: When does the market on the square end
phrases.cultural_note: Market closing times can be flexible; vendors often start packing up 30-60 minutes before the official end time.

likely_response.local: Dnes v šest, ale stánky balí dřív.
likely_response.translation_en: Today at six, but the stalls pack up earlier.

responses.english: Today at six, but the stalls pack up earlier.
responses.french: Dnes v šest, ale stánky balí dřív.

phrases.intent_en: Which cafes here prefer cash payment
phrases.text_local: Které kavárny tady upřednostňují platbu v hotovosti?
phrases.cultural_note: Smaller, traditional Czech bakeries and cafés, especially outside major chains, often operate cash-only.

likely_response.local: Tahle malá pekárna vedle, karty neberou.
likely_response.translation_en: This small bakery next door, they don't take cards.

responses.english: This small bakery next door, they don't take cards.
responses.french: Tahle malá pekárna vedle, karty neberou.

phrases.intent_en: How do I reach the F.X. Šalda Theatre from here
phrases.text_local: Jak se odsud dostanu k divadlu F. X. Šaldy?
phrases.cultural_note: The theatre is a prominent landmark on the main square. Giving directions relative to the square is most natural.

likely_response.local: Rovně přes náměstí, uvidíte ho nalevo.
likely_response.translation_en: Straight across the square, you will see it on the left.

responses.english: Straight across the square, you will see it on the left.
responses.french: Rovně přes náměstí, uvidíte ho nalevo.
